Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,T>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being verified
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp, ArrayVerifierNoOp, ClassVerifierNoOp, CollectionVerifierNoOp, InetAddressVerifierNoOp, ListVerifierNoOp, MapVerifierNoOp, ObjectVerifierNoOp, OptionalVerifierNoOp, PathVerifierNoOp, StringVerifierNoOp, UriVerifierNoOp, UrlVerifierNoOp
public abstract class AbstractObjectVerifierNoOp<S,T> extends Object implements ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
An ExtensibleObjectVerifier that does nothing. A validator that ignores all subsequent failures because they are guaranteed to fail and would add any value to the end-user. For example, an attempt was made to dereference null or cast the value to an incompatible type.

      public S isSameObjectAs(Object expected, String name)

    • isOneOf

      public S isOneOf(Collection<? super T> collection)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleObjectVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value is one of the elements in a collection. This is typically used to ensure that the actual value is valid.
      Specified by:
      isOneOf in interface ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
      Parameters:
      collection - a collection
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • isNotOneOf

      public S isNotOneOf(Collection<? super T> collection)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleObjectVerifier
      Ensures that the actual value is not one of the elements in a collection. This is typically used to ensure that the actual value is not a reserved value.
      Specified by:
      isNotOneOf in interface ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
      Parameters:
      collection - a collection
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • asString

      public S asString(Consumer<StringVerifier> consumer)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleObjectVerifier
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Specified by:
      asString in interface ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
      Parameters:
      consumer - verifies the String representation of the actual value
      Returns:
      the updated verifier

    • isActualAvailable

      public boolean isActualAvailable()
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleObjectVerifier
      Indicates if the actual value is available.
      Specified by:
      isActualAvailable in interface ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
      Returns:
      true unless assertThat() was invoked and assertions are disabled (in which case the value was discarded), or the actual value was converted to an incompatible type

    • getActual

      public T getActual()
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleObjectVerifier
      Returns the actual value. The return value is undefined if ExtensibleObjectVerifier.isActualAvailable() is false.
      Specified by:
      getActual in interface ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,T>
      Returns:
      the actual value
